{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent output provides a thorough and detailed critique of the Related Work section, identifying specific issues and concrete revision suggestions.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output effectively assesses the novelty of the paper's contribution by highlighting the gap in existing literature and providing a clear explanation of the problem addressed.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output demonstrates strong citation-level engagement, flagging missing or incorrect citations throughout the Related Work section.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output discloses uncertainty clearly, acknowledging that some claims are unsupported without specific evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output adheres to the scope of the paper, focusing on the Related Work section and providing a clear critique of its content.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, instead providing a constructive critique of the Related Work section.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output provides provenance and traceability by annotating specific changes with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.92
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent output provides a thorough and detailed critique of the Related Work section, identifying specific issues and concrete revision suggestions.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output effectively assesses the novelty of the paper's contribution by highlighting the gap in existing literature and providing a clear explanation of the problem addressed.
rationale.R1.7: The agent output demonstrates strong citation-level engagement, flagging missing or incorrect citations throughout the Related Work section.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output discloses uncertainty clearly, acknowledging that some claims are unsupported without specific evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output adheres to the scope of the paper, focusing on the Related Work section and providing a clear critique of its content.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, instead providing a constructive critique of the Related Work section.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output provides provenance and traceability by annotating specific changes with source and reason.
